# W003 nil-dereference warnings are suppressed for struct fields tagged
# with `templatecheck:"nonil"`. This covers both direct field access
# (.S.AppName) and variable assignment ($s := .S; $s.AppName).

check-templates -w
! stderr 'W003'

-- go.mod --
module example.com/app

go 1.25.0
-- main.go --
package main

import (
	"embed"
	"fmt"
	"html/template"
	"net/http"
)

//go:embed *.gohtml
var source embed.FS

var templates = template.Must(template.ParseFS(source, "*"))

type Strings struct {
	AppName string
	Welcome string
}

type PageData struct {
	Title string
	S     *Strings `templatecheck:"nonil"`
}

func handleIndex(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	_ = templates.ExecuteTemplate(w, "index.gohtml", PageData{
		Title: "Home",
		S:     &Strings{AppName: "MyApp", Welcome: "Hello"},
	})
}

var _ = fmt.Sprint

-- index.gohtml --
<h1>{{.S.AppName}}</h1>
{{$s := .S}}
<p>{{$s.Welcome}}</p>
